history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young East Asian man with dark, styled hair, wearing a light blue, oversized, short-sleeved button-down shirt over a white t-shirt, and loose white trousers. He has a black shoulder bag slung over his left shoulder and wears a silver watch on his left wrist. His right arm is extended, and his left hand is in his pocket. The background appears to be an outdoor setting with a building facade featuring wooden elements and a large window. Inside the window, there are shelves with items, and a light fixture with a cylindrical shade hangs from the ceiling. The lighting is soft and natural, creating a relaxed and casual mood. The color palette is dominated by soft blues, whites, and natural wood tones, with a touch of black from the bag. The style is contemporary streetwear with a minimalist aesthetic.
